record.field: List classes/sessions for a given date
What classes are on today? List all classes for Friday Show me Monday's classes What sessions do we have this week?
Get the class schedule for today or a specific date (tomorrow, yesterday, or YYYY-MM-DD)

What's the schedule today? Show today's classes What classes are happening now? What's on the schedule? What do we have today? Show tomorrow's schedule What's on tomorrow? Classes for tomorrow Schedule for tomorrow What classes are tomorrow? What's the schedule for Monday? Show schedule for 2026-04-20 Classes this week
Get attendance history for a member
Show John's attendance history How often has Sarah been coming in? When did Test8 last attend? Show me Mike's recent classes What's Jane's attendance like?
Check in a member for attendance
Check in John Mark Sarah as present Test8 just arrived Sign in Mike for class Check in Jane Doe
Check out a member from attendance
Check out John Mark Sarah as done for today Test8 is leaving Sign out Mike Jane is heading home
Manually create an attendance log entry
Log attendance for John at 5pm Create an attendance entry for Sarah Record Test8's check-in at 3:30pm
List members enrolled in today's sessions who have not yet checked in
Who hasn't checked in today? Show me members that still need to check in Which students are missing from today's class? Who is enrolled but not here yet? List members who need to check in
List members who were enrolled in a past session but did not check in (absent)
Who didn't show up to yesterday's class? List the no-shows for last Tuesday's session Which enrolled students were absent? Who missed the 6pm class? No-show list for today's session
